summary: Iteration 89: Extended Profile Fields (birth_date, phone, preferred_contact) - All tests passed. Backend APIs (signup, login, /auth/me, /auth/profile) correctly handle extended profile fields stored in tenant settings JSONB. Frontend signup form shows new fields with WhatsApp default selected. Settings page profile card has 'Trocar Foto' hover overlay, account panel displays all extended fields with correct values loaded from backend.
critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx: Signup form correctly shows birth_date (date input), phone (tel input), and preferred_contact (WhatsApp/SMS toggle buttons)
Login.jsx: WhatsApp is selected by default (preferredContact state initialized to 'whatsapp')
Login.jsx: signUp function passes extras param with birth_date, phone, preferred_contact to AuthContext
Settings.jsx: Profile card has hover overlay with camera icon and 'Trocar' text (language-aware)
Settings.jsx: Account panel shows Nascimento, Telefone, Contato Preferido fields with correct data-testid attributes
Settings.jsx: Extended fields loaded from /api/auth/me on component mount
auth.py: Signup stores extended fields in tenant settings JSONB, not users table columns
auth.py: Login returns extended fields from tenant settings
auth.py: GET /auth/me returns birth_date, phone, preferred_contact from tenant settings
auth.py: PUT /auth/profile updates extended fields in tenant settings JSONB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Extended profile fields (birth_date, phone, preferred_contact) are stored in tenant settings JSONB in Supabase, NOT in users table columns. Test user has birth_date=1990-05-15, phone=+5511999999999, preferred_contact=whatsapp. Profile card in Settings has CSS hover overlay showing camera icon + 'Trocar' text. Account panel shows avatar with click-to-change feature that toggles showAvatarPicker state.

signup_form_birth_date_input.details: Birth date input (data-testid='input-birthdate') visible with date picker

signup_form_whatsapp_default.details: WhatsApp button selected by default (green border styling)

signup_form_sms_toggle.details: SMS button toggles correctly when clicked

settings_profile_card_hover_overlay.details: Profile card shows 'Trocar' text with camera icon on hover

settings_avatar_picker.details: Clicking avatar in account panel shows Selfie/Upload buttons

api_profile_update_extended_fields.details: PUT /api/auth/profile updates birth_date, phone, preferred_contact in tenant settings

api_signup_extended_fields.details: POST /api/auth/signup accepts and stores birth_date, phone, preferred_contact
